def eligible_for_stock_options(self) -> bool:
        # Write the condition by defining the necessary attribute/attributes to select the employee
        # who is eligible for stock options.
        if (
            self.age >= 18 and self.age <= 60 and
            self.employment_status == EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED and
            self.education in [Education.BACHELOR, Education.MASTER, Education.DOCTOR] and
            self.job_level == 4 and
            self.performance_rating >= 4.5
        ):
            return True
        else:
            return False
